title: Creamy Tomato Basil Soup
instructions: Roast tomatoes, garlic, and onions in the oven at 400°F for 30 minutes.
Transfer roasted vegetables to a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a pot and add vegetable broth. Simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in heavy cream and fresh basil.
Season with salt and pepper. Serve hot.

title: Classic chicken Burger
instructions: Form chicken into 4 equal-sized patties.
Season both sides of the patties generously with salt and pepper.
Grill or pan-fry the patties for 3-4 minutes per side for medium doneness.
Add a slice of cheese to each patty during the last minute of cooking.
Toast the buns and assemble the burgers with lettuce, tomato, onion, and your favorite sauces.

title: Mushroom Risotto
instructions: Sauté mushrooms in olive oil until browned. Set aside.
In the same pan, sauté shallots until translucent.
Add rice and toast for 1-2 minutes until edges are translucent.
Pour in white wine and stir until absorbed.
Add warm broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly until liquid is absorbed before adding more.
When rice is al dente, stir in cooked mushrooms, butter, and Parmesan. Serve immediately.

title: Grilled Lemon Herb Chicken
instructions: Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, garlic, and herbs to make the marinade.
Place chicken breasts in a ziplock bag and pour the marinade over them. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Grill chicken for 6-8 minutes per side, or until internal temperature reaches 165°F.
Let chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.

title: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
instructions: Toast the sourdough bread slices until golden brown.
Mash the avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Bring a pot of water to a gentle simmer. Create a vortex and gently drop in the eggs.
Poach eggs for 3-4 minutes until the whites are set but yolks are still runny.
Spread the mashed avocado on the toast, top with a poached egg, and sprinkle with red pepper flakes.

title: Spicy Salmon Sushi Bowl
instructions: Cook the sushi rice according to package instructions.
In a bowl, mix the cubed salmon with mayonnaise and sriracha.
Divide the cooked rice into bowls.
Top with spicy salmon, cucumber slices, and avocado.
Garnish with sesame seeds and nori strips. Serve with soy sauce.

title: Vegan Lentil Curry
instructions: Heat a pot over medium heat and sauté onions until soft.
Add garlic, ginger, curry powder, and turmeric. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in the lentils, coconut milk, and vegetable broth.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20-25 minutes until lentils are tender.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve with rice or naan bread.

title: Garlic Butter Steak Bites
ingredients: 1.5 lbs sirloin steak, cut into 1-inch cubes
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
instructions: Season the steak cubes generously with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a heavy skillet over high heat until smoking.
Add steak bites in a single layer and sear for 1-2 minutes without moving them.
Flip the bites and cook for another minute.
Reduce heat to medium, add butter and garlic to the pan, and toss the steak gently to coat for 30 seconds.
Remove from heat, garnish with parsley, and serve immediately.

title: Caprese Salad
instructions: Arrange alternating slices of tomato and mozzarella on a serving platter.
Tuck fresh basil leaves between the slices.
Drizzle extra virgin olive oil and balsamic glaze over the salad.
Sprinkle generously with coarse sea salt and black pepper.
Serve immediately at room temperature.

title: Pesto Pasta with Cherry Tomatoes
instructions: Boil pasta in salted water according to package directions until al dente.
While pasta cooks, heat olive oil in a pan and sauté garlic and cherry tomatoes until they just start to soften.
Drain pasta, reserving 1/4 cup of the pasta water.
Return pasta to the pot, add the pesto, cooked tomatoes, and a splash of pasta water. Toss gently to combine.
Serve topped with Parmesan cheese and toasted pine nuts.
